items.title: Trump warns Iran will pay 'many times over' for deaths of US soldiers
items.summary: The US president spoke just hours after the two warring sides exchanged strikes for the ninth consecutive day.

items.title: Yemen's Houthis announce 'maritime embargo' on Saudi Arabia
items.summary: The Houthis say the embargo begins immediately and is a response to a Saudi blockade of ports and airports in Yemen.

items.title: Tate brothers appear in US court for extradition proceedings
items.summary: They were arrested on Saturday after the UK announced dozens of new charges, including rape and sex trafficking, which they deny.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 美國務卿：習近平9月訪美未變　中方已派團隊準備
items.summary: 美國國務卿盧比歐今天表示，預期中國國家主席習近平9月訪美，中方已持續派遣團隊進行準備，沒聽到其他說法。此外，美國總統川普也有機會出席在菲律賓舉行的東協峰會。  盧比歐（Marco Rubio...…

items.title: 川普警告伊朗　要為殺害美國軍人付出數倍代價
items.summary: 美軍近日證實有3位官兵在中東地區陣亡，美國總統川普今天警告德黑蘭當局，伊朗要為他們殺害的每一名美國軍人付出「數倍」代價。  法新社報導，川普（Donald Trump）於自家社群媒體「真實社...…

items.title: 英新首相柏南與川普通電話　強調國防與安全承諾
